name: securevector-guard
description: Real-time policy enforcement and tamper-evident audit for MCP tool calls invoked from an OpenAI Codex session. Forwards every tool call to a local SecureVector app for cloud-managed deny rules and persistent audit logging. Fails open if the local app is unreachable.

interface.shortDescription: Real-time policy enforcement and tamper-evident audit for Codex tool calls.
interface.longDescription: SecureVector Guard intercepts every PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and UserPromptSubmit event in your Codex session, forwards them to a local companion app on 127.0.0.1, and applies cloud-managed deny rules in real time. Tool calls are written to a SHA-256 hash-chained audit log on disk. Prompt-injection patterns and credential leaks are surfaced in a local dashboard. Fails open — Codex keeps working when SecureVector is down.
defaultPrompt: Show me my recent Codex tool calls in SecureVector.
